basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 26 June 2026 on the official website iitism.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per GoI rule.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. in Water Resources Engineering/ Hydraulic Engineering/ Hydrology/ Environment Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Civil Engineering/ Earth Sciences or equivalent, GATE/NET qualified, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Agricultural Engineering & Technology
qualification.details: M.Tech. in Water Resources Engineering/ Hydraulic Engineering/ Hydrology/ Environment Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Civil Engineering/ Earth Sciences or equivalent specializations with GATE/NET qualified and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Agricultural Engineering & Technology. Candidates awaiting M.Tech. results are eligible.

salary_details.details: ₹ 37000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for the first two years ₹ 42000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for the third year

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Tech. in Water Resources Engineering/ Hydraulic Engineering/ Hydrology/ Environment Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing & GIS/ Civil Engineering/ Earth Sciences or equivalent specializations with GATE/NET qualified and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Agricultural Engineering & Technology. Candidates awaiting M.Tech. results are eligible.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per GoI rule.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: ₹ 37000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for the first two years ₹ 42000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for the third year

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad ANRF JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the ANRF JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech. degree in relevant fields like Water Resources Engineering, Hydraulic Engineering, Hydrology, Environment Engineering, Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & GIS, Civil Engineering, or Earth Sciences. A B.Tech. in Civil Engineering or Agricultural Engineering & Technology is also required, along with GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the ANRF JRF role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus 20% HRA for the first two years, and Rs. 42,000/- plus 20% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the ANRF JRF post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow position involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates awaiting their M.Tech. results apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who are awaiting their M.Tech. results are eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The ANRF Junior Research Fellow position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read the notification thoroughly before applying.
